data.name: Hentai Girls - Anime Puzzle 18+
data.detailed_description:
Follow and add on wishlist, thanks!


關於此遊戲

By purchasing this game, you are contributing to the release of new parts! With new mechanics and amazing pictures.

Instructions:

You need to restore the image by swapping the bricks.

Key Features:

  • minimum price
  • cute girls and lots of nudity
  • original style and great picture quality
  • simple and fast levels
  • cheat (F key)
  • zooming (you can see every detail!)
  • gallery
  • two levels of difficulty (easy and difficult)
  • nice relaxing music
  • 48 achievements: alphabet, numbers and different symbols (for Steam profile design)

In the near future:

  • trading cards
  • backgrounds (for Steam profile design)

data.short_description: A simple and relaxing classic puzzle game with stunning graphics and music. Naked girls, zooming, gallery, choice of difficulty level. There are 48 achievements available!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 10/11
  • 儲存空間: 110 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
